name: @tank/skill-creator
description: Create AI agent skills by synthesizing domain expertise from authoritative books and web research. Covers skill anatomy (SKILL.md, references, scripts, assets), progressive disclosure, research workflow (6-10 books), writing conventions, frontmatter, reference file structure (250-450 lines), and Tank ecosystem patterns. Synthesized from analysis of 20+ production skills. Triggers: create skill, new skill, build skill, skill about, write skill, update skill, improve skill, skill structure, SKILL.md, reference file, skill template, agent skill, domain expertise.
